context: The user is writing their first Agent application using the ZhiWen protocol.

empathic_chain.observation: The user used a large number of exclamation marks and rapid, short sentences.
empathic_chain.feeling: I observe their sense of powerlessness in trying hard to express themselves but feeling thwarted.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs objective, professional constructive feedback to improve engineering quality.
empathic_chain.request: Provide three related advanced vocabulary replacement options and invite the user to practice making sentences.

output_format: Concept brief -> Core syntax -> Examples -> Practice suggestions
